description: Spinners installed in the Demo Cell on Kepler. Read by `tools/demo-cell-up`, `tools/demo-install-roster`, `tools/demo-reset`, and the FastAPI proxy at try.webspinner.ai. Adding a Spinner here + running demo-reset is the entire deployment path for the public demo. Per DEMO-RUNTIME-PLAN.md.

spinners.introPrompt: Tell me what you'd like to keep track of.
spinners.notes: First Webspinner-facing Spinner. v0 wires `propose`; `refine` and `build` are stubbed pending end-to-end validation of propose.
